ABOUT.TITLE: Who am I?
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: I am Dante Rognoni, Junior Full-Stack Developer
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Junior Full-Stack Developer and University Technician in Programming graduated from UTN. I have practical experience building web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, and relational databases. Passionate about best practices, software architecture, and agile methodologies (SCRUM).

SERVICES.TITLE: Here's what I'm good at
SERVICES.CARD_1_DESC: Building responsive, dynamic, and user-friendly web interfaces using modern frameworks like Angular, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS.
SERVICES.CARD_2_DESC: Designing robust and scalable RESTful APIs and server-side logic using Java, Spring Boot, and advanced Object-Oriented Programming principles.
SERVICES.CARD_3_DESC: Structuring and optimizing data storage solutions using both relational (SQL) and non-relational (NoSQL) databases.
SERVICES.CARD_4_DESC: Ensuring code reliability and high-quality software delivery through comprehensive testing methodologies using tools like Mockito.
SERVICES.CARD_5_DESC: Creation and management of large volumes of data for the creation of interactive dashboards.
SERVICES.CARD_6_DESC: Experienced in working with Scrum methodologies to ensure efficient project delivery, continuous improvement, and effective team collaboration.
SERVICES.CARD_7_DESC: Deploying private Large Language Models (LLMs) on local hardware using Ollama for secure and customized AI environments.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Professional Experience
EXPERIENCE.SUBTITLE: My Journey as a Developer
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_DESC: Web platform development (Back-office and Online Store) with multilayer architecture and MVC pattern.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_BULLET_1: Creation of RESTful API with Java, Spring Boot (Spring Data JPA, Hibernate) and security with Spring Security and JWT tokens (stateless).
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_BULLET_2: Development of a responsive SPA with Angular, TypeScript, and SCSS/Angular Material.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_BULLET_3: Integration of Mercado Pago API for checkout and automated SMTP service.

WORK.TITLE: My Projects
WORK.SUBTITLE: Here are my latest GitHub repositories
WORK.PROJ_1_DESC: A comprehensive platform for inventory management and online store operations. Built with modern web technologies to handle full e-commerce flows.
WORK.PROJ_2_DESC: A complete web application designed to create, manage, and organize events efficiently, focusing on a clean and intuitive user experience.
WORK.PROJ_3_DESC: An intuitive application developed for personal savings tracking and money management, helping users keep their finances in order.
WORK.PROJ_4_DESC: Created custom analytics dashboards for a streamer to visualize and analyze video game data and performance metrics in real-time.
WORK.PROJ_5_DESC: A robust administrative system for gyms built in Java. It handles members, staff, memberships, and equipment via file persistence (JSON).
WORK.PROJ_6_DESC: Terminal-based hotel booking application developed in C. It handles room availability, customer data, and reservations using binary files.
